title: Malicious website impersonating Skopeo
body:
Had a user encounter `Skopeo dot org` which is a malicious website that eventually redirects people to info stealer malware that attempts to steal cookies, keychain, etc. 

Definitely not a problem with your project but I figured I would give you a head up, I am also reporting it to Cloudflare abuse, Google Safe Browsing etc.

Thank you!

comments.body:
Thanks, not anything we can do about it but looks like cloudflare does flag the site now.
 
We own the podman.io and buildah.io domains, not anything else AFAIK.
Np, I submitted it everywhere I could, figured having an issue wouldn't hurt, understand you can't do much more, you can close this!
It seems CloudFlare is now blocking the site. Thanks!
